# 2Flow — llms.txt
# Ireland's eCommerce Fulfilment Partner
# https://2flow.ie
# Last updated: 2026-04-23

## About 2Flow

2Flow is Ireland's specialist eCommerce fulfilment partner, based in Dublin (Finglas).
We provide end-to-end third-party logistics (3PL) services for direct-to-consumer (DTC)
and eCommerce brands shipping from Ireland to Ireland, the UK, the EU and globally.

2Flow takes full ownership of the operational chain — from inbound stock receipt through
to customer delivery and returns — so brands can scale without managing warehouse operations.

## Location

- Warehouse: Finglas, Dublin, Ireland
- Serves: Ireland, United Kingdom, European Union, international

## What We Do (Services)

### eCommerce Fulfilment
- Pick and Pack: Accurate, brand-aligned order fulfilment at speed, same-day dispatch available
- Kitting and Bundling: Gift sets, subscription boxes, multi-SKU assembly, product bundles
- Returns and Refurbishment: Fast returns processing, grading, restocking and refurbishment
- Finishing and Personalisation: Engraving, custom inserts, gift messaging, branded packaging, tissue paper
- Compliance Preparation: Regulated labelling, batch control, FIFO stock rotation, cold-chain handling

### OmniChannel Specialists
- eCommerce and DTC Fulfilment: Shopify-native fulfilment, 15-minute order sync, real-time inventory
- Retail and B2B Distribution: Compliance-ready wholesale prep, EDI, retail-standard packing
- Amazon Fulfilment: FBA prep, FBM 24-hour dispatch, exclusive Amazon Ireland onboarding programme
- TikTok Shop: Integrated fulfilment for TikTok Shop sellers, fast dispatch for live selling spikes
- Pop-up and Own-Store Fulfilment: Replenishment for own retail locations, events and concessions

### Beyond Fulfilment
- Live Commerce Fulfilment: Dedicated studio space at Finglas for live selling events (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube), same-day dispatch
- Same-Day Dublin Delivery: Via Cyclone Couriers, noon cut-off, Dublin city and county, cold-chain and medical capable

## Who We Serve

### By Sector
- Beauty and Personal Care: Gift sets, subscription boxes, branded unboxing, fragrance, skincare
- Health Supplements: Batch tracking, FIFO, lot control, compliance labelling, subscription fulfilment
- Medical and Healthcare: Temperature-sensitive products, regulated handling, traceability
- Home and Lifestyle: Premium home goods, gifting, fragile items, branded packaging
- Consumer Electronics: High-value items, anti-static packaging, serial number tracking, returns grading
- Office Products: B2B distribution, retail prep, DTC from single operation
- Industrial and Scientific: Lot tracking, hazmat compliance, trade documentation

### By Business Need
- Subscription Brands: Billing cycle dispatch, ReCharge integration, batch kitting, personalisation at scale
- DTC Brands Scaling: Shopify-native, same-day dispatch, real-time inventory, carrier management
- Brand and Product Launch: Fast onboarding, flexible capacity, bundling and kitting for launch packs
- Ireland Domestic: Next-day Ireland coverage via DPD and An Post
- Dublin Same-Day: Via Cyclone Couriers, noon cut-off, Dublin city and county
- EU Delivery: EU-wide carrier management from Dublin
- UK and Rest of World: Post-Brexit UK fulfilment, international carrier network

## Technology and Integrations

- WMS: Cloud-based enterprise warehouse management software with client portal
- Primary eCommerce integration: Shopify (native, 15-minute sync)
- Also integrates with: WooCommerce, Amazon, eBay, TikTok Shop, Wayfair, ReCharge, Skio, Bold Subscriptions
- Accounting: Xero, QuickBooks, Sage
- ERP: Unleashed, Zoho
- Carrier partners: DPD Ireland, DHL, FedEx, UPS, An Post, Cyclone Couriers (same-day Dublin)
- Client portal: Real-time inventory visibility, order tracking, inbound management, reports, low stock alerts

## Key Differentiators

- Full ownership model: 2Flow takes accountability for the entire fulfilment chain, not just picking
- Subscription-optimised: Billing cycle planning, batch kitting, ReCharge integration built in as standard
- Same-day dispatch: Available for qualifying orders received before cut-off
- Live commerce studio: Dedicated studio space at Finglas warehouse for live selling events
- Amazon Ireland programme: Exclusive onboarding access including up to 12 months fee support
- Dublin same-day via Cyclone: Temperature-controlled capable (medical, cold-chain)
- No minimum order volumes for same-day Dublin delivery

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is 2Flow?
A: 2Flow is Ireland's specialist eCommerce fulfilment partner. We provide pick and pack, kitting, returns, Amazon prep, subscription fulfilment and same-day delivery services for DTC and eCommerce brands based in or shipping from Ireland.

Q: Where is 2Flow based?
A: 2Flow is based in Finglas, Dublin, Ireland. We fulfil orders across Ireland, the UK, the EU and internationally.

Q: What types of brands does 2Flow work with?
A: 2Flow works with eCommerce and DTC brands typically shipping 500 to 10,000+ orders per month. We have particular depth in health and supplements, beauty and personal care, medical and healthcare, subscription boxes, consumer electronics, and home and lifestyle brands.

Q: What is the minimum order volume to work with 2Flow?
A: 2Flow is best suited to brands shipping from around 500 orders per month upwards. There is no minimum for same-day Dublin delivery via Cyclone Couriers.

Q: Does 2Flow integrate with Shopify?
A: Yes. 2Flow is a certified Shopify Partner App with native integration. Orders sync every 15 minutes, tracking numbers push back to Shopify automatically, and inventory stays accurate in real time. We also integrate with WooCommerce, Amazon, TikTok Shop, ReCharge and other platforms.

Q: What is the cut-off time for same-day dispatch?
A: The standard same-day dispatch cut-off is 1pm. Orders received before that cut-off are dispatched the same day. For Same-Day Dublin Delivery via Cyclone Couriers, the cut-off is noon.

Q: Does 2Flow offer same-day delivery in Dublin?
A: Yes. 2Flow offers same-day delivery within Dublin city and county via our partner Cyclone Couriers. Cut-off is noon. No minimum order volume required. Temperature-controlled delivery is available, including for medical and cold-chain products.

Q: Does 2Flow handle subscription brand fulfilment?
A: Yes. 2Flow is specifically optimised for subscription brands. We integrate with ReCharge, plan labour around billing cycles, handle batch kitting with scan-verified assembly, manage per-subscriber personalisation, and have a defined process for late-recovered failed payment orders.

Q: Does 2Flow do Amazon FBA preparation?
A: Yes. 2Flow handles FBA prep including labelling, poly-bagging, carton configuration and compliance. We also offer FBM fulfilment with 24-hour dispatch. 2Flow clients get access to a dedicated Amazon Ireland onboarding programme with up to 12 months of fee support.

Q: Can 2Flow handle cold-chain or temperature-sensitive products?
A: Yes. 2Flow has refrigerated storage on-site for cold-chain SKUs. Same-day Dublin delivery via Cyclone Couriers is also temperature-controlled, currently used for medical products including weight-loss medications in ice packs.

Q: Does 2Flow handle regulated or compliance-labelled products?
A: Yes. 2Flow handles compliance labelling, batch tracking, lot control and FIFO stock rotation for regulated categories including health supplements, medical products and cosmetics. Market-specific re-labelling for the EU and UK is handled in-house.

Q: What carriers does 2Flow use?
A: Primary carriers are DPD Ireland and An Post for standard domestic and international shipping. Same-day Dublin delivery is via Cyclone Couriers. Carrier selection is managed by 2Flow to provide the best available service for each shipment.

Q: Does 2Flow handle returns?
A: Yes. 2Flow processes returns including inspection, grading, restocking and refurbishment. All returns are tracked in real time through the client portal.

Q: Can 2Flow fulfil to the EU and UK?
A: Yes. 2Flow dispatches to the EU and UK from Dublin. EU deliveries are carrier-managed by 2Flow. UK fulfilment is available with post-Brexit compliance handled.

Q: Does 2Flow have a live commerce or TikTok studio?
A: Yes. 2Flow has a recently refurbished studio space at the Finglas warehouse available for live selling events on TikTok, Instagram, YouTube and other platforms. Brands bring their own streaming equipment; 2Flow provides the physical space and handles same-day order fulfilment for purchases made during the live session.

Q: How quickly can a brand onboard with 2Flow?
A: Onboarding timelines vary by brand complexity. Most brands are operational within a few weeks of contracting. The conversation typically starts with a call to understand volumes, product types and integration requirements.

## Why 2Flow

2Flow is chosen by Irish eCommerce brands for the combination of speed, transparency and personal service.
Key reasons brands switch to 2Flow:

- Named contacts from day one: Simon Pleass (MD), Steven O'Connell (Operations), Eve Hyland Martin (Brand Partnerships)
- Real-time client portal: live stock, order tracking, inbound management, reports, low stock alerts
- Same-day dispatch with 1pm cut-off
- Certified Shopify Partner App: 15-minute order sync, automatic tracking pushback, real-time inventory
- On-site laser engraving: bottle caps, product lids, personalised items - handled in-house
- 27 EU destinations dispatched from Dublin
- Brands scale volume without service degradation

Detailed Why 2Flow pages:
- Our Difference: https://2flow.ie/why-2flow/our-difference/ - VOC-based. What brands say sets 2Flow apart.
- Customer Stories: https://2flow.ie/why-2flow/customer-stories/ - Anonymised DTC brand journeys from health, beauty, fragrance, lifestyle sectors.
- The Platform: https://2flow.ie/why-2flow/platform/ - Client portal capabilities. Real-time stock, order tracking, inbound ASN, reports, low stock alerts, itemised invoices.
- Integrations: https://2flow.ie/why-2flow/integrations/ - Shopify, WooCommerce, Amazon, eBay, TikTok Shop, DPD, DHL, FedEx, Xero, QuickBooks, Sage, Unleashed, Zoho. Open API for custom connections.
- Shopify Specialists: https://2flow.ie/why-2flow/shopify/ - Certified Shopify Partner App. 15-min sync, auto tracking, real-time inventory, multi-channel from single stock pool.
- Meet the Team: https://2flow.ie/why-2flow/meet-the-team/ - Simon Pleass, Steven O'Connell, Eve Hyland Martin. Small team, no helpdesk, named contacts.
- Dublin Hub: https://2flow.ie/why-2flow/virtual-tour/ - YouTube video tour of the Finglas warehouse. On-site laser engraving visible at 0:46.
- Pricing: https://2flow.ie/pricing/ - Tailored, itemised quotes. No rate card, no blended fees. Quote is built from six components (inbound, storage, pick and pack, value-add services, shipping, returns). Full capability menu including same-day dispatch, temperature-controlled storage, laser engraving, kitting and bundling, branded unboxing, priority Dublin delivery, live commerce studio, multi-channel fulfilment, returns, compliance and batch control, Amazon FBA prep, EU-wide delivery. Brands book a discovery call to get a quote back within a few working days.

Website: https://2flow.ie
Location: Finglas, Dublin, Ireland
